svg.title: Employee engagement in India and benchmarks
svg.desc: Employee engagement in India and benchmarks. Source: Gallup State of the Global Workplace 2025. Three-year rolling averages. India 2022 represents a recent peak; the 2025 figure is the lowest in four years. South Asia and global figures are provided for comparison.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Employee engagement in India and benchmarks

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: Gallup State of the Global Workplace 2025 — Three-year rolling averages. India 2022 represents a recent peak; the 2025 figure is the lowest in four years. South Asia and global figures are provided for comparison.
